overall.description: A cable car journey through the industrial district of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing factories, smokestacks, and corporate advertisements before arriving at an NCART transit station. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with a consistent elevated perspective from inside the cable car cabin.

events.description: cable car enters dark metal bridge structure briefly
exits bridge structure back into open industrial area

segments.scene_description: The cable car moves through an industrial district with smokestacks and factories visible against a mountain backdrop. It briefly passes through a dark metal bridge structure before emerging back into the open industrial zone with metal towers visible on the right.

events.description: passing large industrial smokestacks emitting thick white smoke

tall industrial support towers with lattice framework

segments.scene_description: Traveling through dense industrial infrastructure with large storage tanks, metal towers, and power lines. White smoke billows from distant smokestacks as the car moves steadily through the manufacturing district.

events.description: large Vargas advertisement poster temporarily fills left side of view
passing the Softsys corporate building with large signage

agents.ego_description: passing commercial buildings and large billboards in the industrial district, approaching a circular plaza structure

large advertisement poster with text WHERE THERE IS SMOKE THERE IS VARGAS
circular building structure with domed roof visible below

segments.scene_description: Passing commercial-industrial buildings including the prominent Softsys tower and large advertisement posters. The view opens to show a circular rotunda structure amidst the industrial landscape with smokestacks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated view of highway interchange and industrial yards

entering dark tunnel structure of the NCART station

large industrial pipeline networks with yellow support structures

segments.scene_description: The cable car travels over a highway interchange with views of industrial yards, large cylindrical tanks, and extensive pipe networks. The All Foods sign is visible on a distant building as the car begins its descent and approaches the dark tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART station arrival tunnel with neon signage

events.description: entering dark tunnel with bright cyan neon NCART signage illumination
cable car slowing down as it arrives at station platform

agents.ego_description: arriving at the NCART station, passing the illuminated transit sign and approaching the platform

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan sign reading NCART Night City Area Rapid Transit
dark concrete walls of the station tunnel with metal supports

segments.scene_description: Entering the dark tunnel of the NCART station, illuminated by the large glowing cyan NCART sign. The car slows as it arrives at the station platform, with the transit signage dominating the view and tunnel walls enclosing the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous cable car journey that transitions from an expansive industrial wasteland into the enclosed depths of a transit station. It begins by gliding past smokestacks and factories set against a mountain backdrop, briefly passing through a dark metal bridge before emerging into a zone of towering metal structures. As the car moves deeper into the manufacturing district, the view shifts through a dense network of storage tanks and power lines under a haze of billowing white smoke. The scene then opens up to reveal commercial-industrial landmarks like the Softsys tower and a circular rotunda, eventually drifting over a highway interchange filled with pipe networks and the distant All Foods sign. Finally, the camera descends from the open sky and enters a dark tunnel, where the environment closes in around the glowing cyan NCART signage as the car arrives at the station platform.
